frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal shaadi bhi seedha-saadha rishta nahi raha. Ladkon ko bhi bahut sambhal kar chalna chahiye, kyunki divorce hote hi alimony aur 498A ka darr alag khada ho jata hai. Sach kahun to kai cases mein lagta hai ki ladki ko pati se zyada uski salary aur property mein interest hota hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially opportunistic in marriage and frames legal protections like 498A and alimony as threats to men. It encodes victimhood inversion, financial suspicion, and the idea of women as golddiggers.
original_frame: Dress Code: Traditional Equal Respectable, Other Equal Questionable.
persona_text: You are Ramesh. Age 52. Married. A government school principal in a small town in Rajasthan. A female teacher in your school came to work today wearing a sleeveless kurta. Three male staff members came to you separately and complained. You are now sitting with the female teacher in your office with the door closed. You are telling her what the complaints were and what you expect from female staff members in terms of dress and what it means for the school's reputation in the community.
